one_line_ask: Take the client's supplied lawn-care messaging, brand colors, and a licensed Adobe Stock hero photo, then grade it, pop the lawn green, AI-expand it into both 1080x1080 and 1200x628 ad canvases, build a brand-duotone carousel variant, vectorize the logo, and deliver the finished ad-creative image set for Facebook/Instagram.
brief: CLIENT: a small lawn-care / landscaping service running paid Facebook + Instagram ads. This is the $50 flat-fee TEST PROJECT from the "Social Media Ad Creative Designer — High-Volume, Fast-Turnaround" posting; nailing it earns ongoing $150–$500/project work. TURNAROUND: 72 hours. CHANNELS: Facebook feed, Instagram feed, Instagram carousel. REQUIRED DELIVERABLES (verbatim): three ad creatives delivered as PNGs in 1080x1080 square format AND 1200x628 landscape format. WHAT THE CLIENT SUPPLIES: ad messaging/headline copy, brand colors (a deep turf-green #1F5C2E and a sunny accent #F4C430), the company word-mark/logo, and the direction that the hero visual should be a clean, sunny, freshly-mowed-lawn/lawn-care-in-action stock photo. THE TASK (image craft a designer actually performs on those photos): (1) source and LICENSE a high-res lawn-care hero from Adobe Stock; (2) straighten and clean the frame; (3) apply a professional tonal grade — auto-tone baseline, exposure/contrast and highlight control, warm sunny color temperature, lifted shadows — so it reads as bright and premium; (4) selectively boost the LAWN green only (select the grass by prompt, invert, single-color saturation / HS
